vasuyadav@vyadav-C9NHX2LXMR switchyard % curl -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:4545/runs?wait=1" \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "runtime": "codex",
    "provider": "openai",
    "model": "gpt-5.5",
    "adapterType": "process",
    "cwd": "/Users/vasuyadav/Downloads/Projects/switchyard",
    "task": "Return one sentence describing this repository. Do not edit files.",
    "metadata": {
      "reasoningEffort": "low",
      "reasoningSummary": "auto",
      "verbosity": "low",
      "sandbox": "read-only"
    }
  }'

curl -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:4545/runs?wait=1" \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "runtime": "codex",
    "provider": "openai",
    "model": "gpt-5.5",
    "adapterType": "process",
    "cwd": "/Users/vasuyadav/Downloads/Projects/switchyard",
    "task": "Return one sentence describing this repository. Do not edit files.",
    "metadata": {
      "reasoningEffort": "low",
      "reasoningSummary": "auto",
      "verbosity": "low",
      "sandbox": "read-only",
      "ignoreUserConfig": true
    },
    "timeoutSeconds": 120
  }'
